'''Bron''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Junior Representative/Legends|representative]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]
.

==Biography==
In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], Bron was assigned to [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] to "observe" [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] ways and persuade the local population to technological progress to the citizens of the Republic. As he landed on Cerea, he was one of the few to be granted permission to move outside the citadel. However, he used this as an opportunity to keep public appearances about the benefits of civilized life. His speeches were particularly among the younger generation of the Cerean that were deliberately against the [[Dorr-Femi-Bonmi|Cerean Elder]] since it was revealed that he served as an agent to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]. Eventually, Bron retreated from public life, though there were rumors, that he was complicit in this plot.
